combinability.combinability_note: The three levers touch THREE ORTHOGONAL subsystems -- cb3=body-GEMM quant, pinned-K=attention kernel, lm_head=lm_head rows -- so they STACK ADDITIVELY at the served-file level. ONE combined submission dir holds a single serve.py fork with three DISTINCT non-colliding additions (setup_cb3_path + pinned-K attn load + lm_head prune keepset), one manifest (+both kernel deps + bucket repoint), one sitecustomize (import all patches). cb3's body-quant checkpoint and lm_head's further-pruned checkpoint COMBINE into ONE bucket (disjoint weight regions: body GEMM vs head rows); pinned-K needs NO checkpoint. NO two levers contend for the same in-tree edit (there are NO in-tree edits). The expensive e2e identity-verify (#319 tier-3) is SHARED: one combined served stack -> one e2e self-referential capture re-keys ALL changes at once, so combined verify = single-lever + per-lever tier-1 micro, NOT the sum.

human_ledger_paragraph: UNIFIED FLAGGED-SUPPLY-LEVER DEPLOY-SURFACE LEDGER. Three flagged supply levers, one page. (1) cb3 body-read shrink: 6 additive files / 0 in-place, ~40.8 GPU-min verify, new reference, +33/+38 TPS contingent on #403, safe_to_request. (2) pinned-K attention rebuild: 5 additive files / 0 in-place, NO checkpoint, new reference, but buys at most +14.29 and CAPS 481.53 ALONE -> useful only STACKED. (3) lm_head: best_loadable_read_shrink_frac=0.0 -> the deployed 21 MB head is a lossy 16384-row truncation already in the base; no loadable identity-safe shrink exists, only more lossy truncation (#406-gated) -> marginal identity-safe lift 0. COMBINABILITY: the three touch three orthogonal subsystems and STACK ADDITIVELY in ONE submission dir + ONE combined checkpoint; no two contend (no in-tree edits); the expensive #319 e2e verify is SHARED. ROLL-UP: no single lever clears 500 except cb3 (contingent). The cheapest sufficient combination is {cb3} if #403 returns L>=+32.52, else {cb3, pinned-K} if L>=+18.23; below +18.23 NOTHING clears 500 (current floor +15.67 -> max stack 497.44). The whole combination stays additive + reversible. SINGLE BINDING CONTINGENCY: #403's PPL-safe-k lift magnitude (threshold +18.23 TPS). No GPU compute, no HF job, no served-file change were performed for this ledger.

rollup.single_binding_contingency: kanna #403 PPL-safe-k LIFT MAGNITUDE. The whole >500 decision rides on a SINGLE contingency with a sharp threshold L>=+18.23 TPS: below it, NO additive combination of the three flagged levers clears 500 (pinned-K caps 481.53 alone, lm_head's loadable identity-safe shrink is 0). At the CURRENT measured floor L=+15.67 the MAX stack (467.48+15.67+14.29+0) = 497.44 MISSES 500 by 2.56. If #403 returns L in [18.23, 32.52) the cheapest sufficient combination is {cb3, pinned-K}; if L>=32.52, {cb3} alone.

rows.contingency: kanna #403 PPL-safe-k (headline-k PPL-blocked per #394; measured floor +15.67 -> 483.15 MISSES 500). cb3 is necessary-not-sufficient.
rows.name: cb3 body-read shrink

served_file_surface.change: NEW prebuilt cb3 QTIP/QuIP# CUDA ext (RHT incoherence + L1-resident K=64 dim-2 Gaussian VQ dequant GEMM); built OUT-OF-HARNESS, uploaded prebuilt.
NEW Cb3Config + Cb3LinearMethod via the ADDITIVE @register_quantization_config("cb3") decorator (appends to vLLM QUANTIZATION_METHODS at import). NO in-tree vLLM edit.
FORK of the deployed manifest; deltas = +cb3 kernel dep, WEIGHTS_BUCKET -> cb3-baked checkpoint.
FORK of the deployed serve stack; delta = +setup_cb3_path() so the child imports cb3_quant_patch. NO new vLLM source-patch.
FORK of the deployed sitecustomize finder; delta = import cb3_quant_patch.
NEW remote checkpoint config declaring quant_method "cb3" (vLLM auto-selects, no CLI flag). Separate bucket; the deployed int4 checkpoint is untouched.

rows.verify_harness_3tier: TIER1 per-GEMM/-config M=1-vs-M=8 byte-identity (#390); TIER2 decode-width e2e identity (#381); TIER3 e2e SELF-REFERENTIAL gate (#319: gen_greedy_reference --mode served + greedy_gate.compare + greedy_identity_interlock).
rows.verify_reference_rekey: RHT+VQ dequant changes the weights -> different argmax -> #319 re-keys to cb3's OWN M=1 AR decode (never inherited from int4).

rows.contingency: CAPS 481.53 ALONE (attention-free deployed strict < deployed non-strict) -> USEFUL ONLY STACKED; cannot clear 500 by itself. The +14.29 itself is MEASURED (not contingent).
rows.name: pinned-K attention rebuild

served_file_surface.change: NEW prebuilt rebuilt-FA2 varlen kernel supporting a FIXED 64-CTA num_splits>1 deterministic split-reduce (the served kernel rejects num_splits>1 with NotImplementedError). Built OUT-OF-HARNESS, uploaded prebuilt. #400 n_distinct_kernel_rebuilds=1.
NEW patch routing the served attention to the rebuilt fixed-64-CTA FA2 (deterministic reduction order). Imported via sitecustomize. NO in-tree vLLM edit; the shipping FA2 path is untouched.
FORK of the deployed manifest; delta = +pinned-K attn kernel dep. NO WEIGHTS_BUCKET change (weights identical; only the attention reduction order changes).
FORK of the deployed serve stack; delta = +load the pinned-K attn kernel / select the backend.
FORK of the deployed sitecustomize finder; delta = import pinnedk_attn_patch.

rows.verify_harness_3tier: TIER1 per-GEMM/-config M=1-vs-M=8 byte-identity (#390); TIER2 decode-width e2e identity (#381); TIER3 e2e SELF-REFERENTIAL gate (#319: gen_greedy_reference --mode served + greedy_gate.compare + greedy_identity_interlock).
rows.verify_reference_rekey: the fixed 64-CTA multi-split reduction order != the deployed num_splits=1 serial un-pack -> NEW bytes (#400 empirical new-reference probe) -> #319 re-keys to the rebuilt-attn stack's OWN M=1 AR. M-invariant byte-exact FEASIBLE (Marlin-grounded).

rows.contingency: best_loadable_read_shrink_frac=0.0 -> the deployed 21 MB head is a LOSSY 16384-row truncation ALREADY in the 467.48 base; the loadable identity-safe floor is int4-Marlin 336 MB (full-vocab identity COSTS ~54 roofline-TPS). The only further shrink is MORE lossy truncation; provability = land #406 (in flight).
rows.name: lm_head read-reduction / truncation

served_file_surface.change: FORK of the deployed PCK-04 _prune_lm_head_rows patch with a SMALLER keepset (e.g. 16384->12288 lmhead12k). Meta-tensor scatter hook (already in the deployed stack). LOSSY: cannot emit the dropped vocab rows -> byte-exact only vs its OWN pruned checkpoint, NOT full-256k AR.
FORK of the deployed manifest; delta = WEIGHTS_BUCKET -> further-pruned checkpoint.
FORK of the deployed serve stack; imports the (smaller-keepset) prune patch (same mechanism as the deployed head, smaller keepset).
FORK of the deployed sitecustomize finder; delta = import the prune patch.
NEW remote checkpoint baked with the smaller lm_head keepset. Provability of identity-safety for the further prune is land #406 (in flight). The deployed checkpoint is untouched.

rows.verify_harness_3tier: TIER1 per-GEMM/-config M=1-vs-M=8 byte-identity (#390); TIER2 decode-width e2e identity (#381); TIER3 e2e SELF-REFERENTIAL gate (#319: gen_greedy_reference --mode served + greedy_gate.compare + greedy_identity_interlock).
rows.verify_reference_rekey: best_loadable_read_shrink_frac=0.0 -> NO loadable identity-safe shrink changes anything (no new reference). The ONLY read-shrink is MORE truncation, which changes the argmax SUPPORT -> a self-referential-only (NOT full-256k) reference; its provability is land #406 (in flight).

single_binding_contingency: kanna #403 PPL-safe-k LIFT MAGNITUDE. The whole >500 decision rides on a SINGLE contingency with a sharp threshold L>=+18.23 TPS: below it, NO additive combination of the three flagged levers clears 500 (pinned-K caps 481.53 alone, lm_head's loadable identity-safe shrink is 0). At the CURRENT measured floor L=+15.67 the MAX stack (467.48+15.67+14.29+0) = 497.44 MISSES 500 by 2.56. If #403 returns L in [18.23, 32.52) the cheapest sufficient combination is {cb3, pinned-K}; if L>=32.52, {cb3} alone.
